README.TXT
─
×
Engineering Lead based in Frankfurt. A decade building commerce platforms for Enterprise Retail & Luxury brands that handle serious traffic. Specializing in Node.js, TypeScript, and AWS. Bridging the gap between complex business ROI and robust, scalable code. > Status: _
philosophy.dll
─
×

📊 ROI First

Good code means nothing if it doesn't move the business forward. Focus on shipping features that actually matter.

🎯 Ownership

Teams work best when people own their decisions. I hire smart engineers and get out of their way.

⚙️ Reliability

Systems that process millions in revenue can't afford downtime. Architect for failure because it will happen.

🚀 Keep Moving

Technical debt compounds. Don't chase the latest framework — ensure architecture remains future-proof.

C:\Projects
─
□
×
  • 📁 sento.exe [Rewrite]
    High-performance Chrome MV3 rewrite assistant with Shadow DOM "liquid glass" bubble
  • 📁 synto.exe [Extract]
    Clean Markdown extraction for AI workflows. Privacy-first design.
  • 📁 sonto.exe [Clipboard]
    Quiet side-panel clipboard manager with tagged snippets
  • 📁 nemo.exe
    Privacy-focused browser extension password manager with biometric unlock
  • 📁 awesome_hyva.exe
    Curated technical intelligence hub for Hyvä theme development
